action.reasoning: Observation: In iteration 6, balanced accuracy dropped slightly to 0.6945, but few-shot accuracy improved to 0.6126 while many-shot dropped to 0.7771. Analysis: The logit adjustment (tau=1.3) was too aggressive, over-penalizing head classes. Additionally, CutMix might be too destructive for 32x32 images resized to 224x224. Decision: Reduce tau to 1.15, disable CutMix (keep Mixup), add Model Exponential Moving Average (EMA) for better generalization, add Test-Time Augmentation (TTA) in predict.py, and train for 30 epochs.
